title: Earnings call transcript: SNDL Q4 2024 sees revenue growth, stock rises
text: SNDL Inc reported strong Q4 2024 performance with record-breaking metrics. The company achieved full-year net revenue of $920 million, representing 1.3% growth, while quarterly revenue reached $257.7 million, up 3.7% year-over-year. Gross profit hit a record $240 million for the full year, reflecting 26% growth. CEO Zack George stated: Twenty twenty four has been a year of records for SNDL and highlighted the company's first-ever positive free cash flow of $8.9 million annually. Following the earnings announcement, SNDL's stock rose 4.19%, closing at $1.55. The company reported an EPS of -0.0184, slightly beating forecasts of -0.02, while revenue surpassed expectations of $248.14 million. The company announced its application for Canadian Securities Exchange listing and completed the Endiva acquisition, positioning itself as Canada's largest infused edibles manufacturer. Additionally, SNDL acquired a 5.4% stake in High Tide and retired 10.8 million shares. Management projects flat revenue growth in the liquor segment for 2025 and targets $100 million in annualized free cash flow within three years.
